items.name: Idol's iconic smile of gleam violet eyes 🌠 Ai
items.description:
Amid twilight's grace, her violet eyes shine,
A celestial ballet, galaxies align.
Her captivating smile, a luminary's art,
in thousands of hearts, she leaves her mark.

A revered muse, legends rise and dance,
in her presence, enchantment's sweet trance.
The idol of devotion, her fame transcends,
love's constellation, where wonder never ends.
